name: Superfood Truffles
intro: Do you have three minutes to spare? Do you crave something sweet but still want to provide your body with the very best? Superfood truffles are a daily luxury; in our home they are often the delicious ending to a meal midweek. You can combine half amounts of tahini and almond butter, if you wish.

ingredients.item: tahini, or other type of nut or seed butter

method: In a bowl, stir together all the ingredients. Shape the mixture into small, pointy truffles; if it crumbles a bit, add in some more honey. Or if you’re in a hurry, eat the mixture directly with a spoon. You can roll the truffles in extra cacao powder.
